app.title: Photo Viewer
app.subtitle: A lightweight Chips image viewer focused only on opening, zooming, and saving images.

viewer.emptyPrompt: Drag or click to import an image

status.samePath: The selected location already matches the current image path.

errors.missingPath: No image path is available right now.
errors.unsupportedFile: Only these image formats are supported: {extensions}
errors.openFailed: Failed to open the image. Please check Host routing and resource permissions.
errors.loadFailed: The image could not be loaded. Make sure the resource exists and the format is valid.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to save the image. Please check the destination path and file write permissions.
